title: Tests for API v2
body:
Initial framework for testing the version 2 (HTTP) API.
Includes a collection of tests for some of the existing
endpoints. Not all tests are currently passing.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I'm not terribly happy with the file-descriptor muckery[1]. Suggestions welcome.

 [1] Because subtests are expected to run `podman` or other commands that may emit spurious output, and said output would affect the TAP (`ok/not ok`) stream, I've done some acrobatics to restrict stdout/stderr.
